mapper.select: select c.teacher_id, coalesce(u.nick_name, c.teacher_name, '未指定') as teacher_name, c.semester_id, s.semester_name, round(avg(e.score)::numeric, 2) as avg_score, count(*)::int as eval_count, count(distinct e.course_id)::int as course_count from stu_evaluation e join cou_course c on e.course_id = c.id and c.del_flag = '0' left join sys_user u on c.teacher_id = u.user_id left join sys_semester s on c.semester_id = s.id where (#{semesterId} is null or e.semester_id = #{semesterId}) group by c.teacher_id, coalesce(u.nick_name, c.teacher_name, '未指定'), c.semester_id, s.semester_name order by avg_score desc nulls last
